record.field: List point-of-sale orders with optional filters
Show POS orders today List recent register sales What sold at the counter today POS orders from this week
Look up a specific POS order by reference
Look up POS order 00042-001-0001 Find the POS sale for John Check POS receipt details
List POS sessions (open, closed, or all)
Show open POS sessions List all POS sessions Any active registers Which POS is open right now
Open a new POS session for a given POS config
Open the POS Start a new register session Open the front desk POS Start POS for the pro shop
Close the POS session End the register session Close today's POS Close front desk POS
Get a summary of POS sales for a given day (defaults to today)
POS summary for today How much did we sell today at the counter Daily POS sales report What was today's register total POS revenue today
